mapper.sql: asset_no, asset_name, category, status, description, created_at
rental_no, asset_no, user_no, rental_status, rental_date, return_due_date, returned_at, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM asset ORDER BY asset_no DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO asset (asset_name, category, status, description) VALUES (#{assetName}, #{category}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'AVAILABLE'), #{description})
INSERT INTO asset_rental (asset_no, user_no, rental_status, rental_date, return_due_date) VALUES (#{assetNo}, #{userNo}, COALESCE(#{rentalStatus}, 'REQUESTED'), #{rentalDate}, #{returnDueDate})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM asset_rental WHERE user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY rental_no DESC
SELECT FROM asset_rental ORDER BY rental_no DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE asset_rental SET rental_status = #{status}, returned_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'RETURNED' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE returned_at END WHERE rental_no = #{rentalNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM asset_rental WHERE rental_status = 'REQUESTED'
